messages.text: The mute sentry folds its wrapped arms around you and presses, and the sound-drinking cloth pulls the warmth and the breath out of you at once in a numbing, smothering cold. The blow {verb} you!
The mute sentry lunges to take you in its wrappings and you twist free of the cold, dead cloth before it can close.
The mute sentry closes its whole wrapped bulk over you and holds, and for a long airless moment there is no sound and no warmth and no breath anywhere in the world! The blow {verb} you!
